title: Mangrove Structure in Placencia
text: Field data are maintained in Placencia_mangroves_2025.xlsx on Google Drive. A local copy is fetched automatically before each site build; you can also download the spreadsheet directly.

title: Mangrove Structure in Placencia
text:
Lagoon sectors
Click a region on the map to view its summary table. The three lagoon sectors are upper, lower, and main creek.




Click a sector polygon to load its data table.
